action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch (iteration 0). Need to build a complete training/inference pipeline for DomainNet-345 → Quickdraw DG. Decision: Start with DINOv2 ViT-B/14 because it is highlighted as a strong SSL backbone for OOD features and directly comparable to ERM++ ablations. Use 4-GPU DDP, strong augmentations (RandAugment, RandomGrayscale), domain-balanced sampling, Mixup+CutMix, AdamW+cosine schedule with warmup, AMP, and EMA. First run: only 2 epochs to validate the pipeline, measure iteration time, and submit a baseline eval.
action.command: python -m torch.distributed.run --nproc_per_node=4 train.py --epochs 2 --backbone dinov2 --batch_size 64 --lr 1e-3 --output_dir checkpoints --log_dir logs
